name: OCULUS INC.
summary: Oculus Inc. (OVTZ) is a Canadian-based development-stage technology company headquartered in Vancouver, BC, focused on cyber security, data privacy, and data protection solutions for enterprise customers. Its principal products include the Forget-Me-Yes (FMY) SaaS platform for Right-to-be-Forgotten compliance under GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, and other regulations, the ComplyTrust SaaS Suite (CTSS) for cloud-native data governance, and the legacy Cloud Document Protection System (Cloud-DPS) using digital watermarking for tamper-proof document authentication.

products.name: Forget-Me-Yes (FMY)
products.description: Zero-knowledge SaaS platform managing Right-to-be-Forgotten and Right-of-Erase compliance for GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPL, and other data privacy regulations.

products.name: ComplyTrust SaaS Suite (CTSS)
products.description: Cloud-native data management and regulatory compliance tools targeting AWS customers for automated data governance and compliance reporting.

products.name: Cloud Document Protection System (Cloud-DPS)
products.description: SaaS-based document management platform using digital watermarking for tamper-proof document authentication and protection.

partnerships.description: FMY initial release includes subscriber connectors specific to Salesforce organizations.
FMY SaaS platform launched under AWS infrastructure; CTSS tools designed to help AWS customers manage data protection and compliance.
